testcase.name: test_privbayes_record_replay_hooks[1.0-fake-bounded:replace:uniform_supported(s=1)]

failure.message: AssertionError: Equality Failure @ 'is_weak_mi' (Call 11) Record (D) : False Replay (D'): True

testcase.failure: examples/synthcity_auditing/tests/test_privbayes_audit.py:138: in test_privbayes_record_replay_hooks raise error examples/synthcity_auditing/tests/test_privbayes_audit.py:129: in ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pydantic/deprecated/decorator.py:151: in call return self.execute(m) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ examples/synthcity_auditing/synthcity/src/synthcity/plugins/core/plugin.py:254: in fit output = self._fit(X, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ examples/synthcity_auditing/synthcity/src/synthcity/plugins/privacy/plugin_privbayes.py:696: in _fit self.model.fit(X.dataframe()) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pydantic/deprecated/decorator.py:56: in wrapper_function return vd.call(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pydantic/deprecated/decorator.py:151: in call return self.execute(m) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pydantic/deprecated/decorator.py:227: in execute return self.raw_function(**d, **var_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ examples/synthcity_auditing/synthcity/src/synthcity/plugins/privacy/plugin_privbayes.py:133: in fit self.dag = self._greedy_bayes(data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pydantic/deprecated/decorator.py:56: in wrapper_function return vd.call(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pydantic/deprecated/decorator.py:151: in call return self.execute(m) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ examples/synthcity_auditing/synthcity/src/synthcity/plugins/privacy/plugin_privbayes.py:284: in _greedy_bayes is_weak_mi = ensure_equality(is_weak_mi=is_weak_mi) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /workspace/dp-recorder/src/dp_recorder/auditing/audit_primitives.py:640: in ensure_equality return auditor.check_equality(value=value, label=label) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /workspace/dp-recorder/src/dp_recorder/auditing/audit_primitives.py:287: in check_equality raise AssertionError( E AssertionError: Equality Failure @ 'is_weak_mi' (Call 11) E Record (D) : False E Replay (D'): True
